title: Ahearne on Racks
content:
Racks are literally the best way you can turn a bike from merely a recreation vehicle to a utilitarian recreational vehicle. We’ve been featuring the work of Ahearne cycles since 2012, and all the while, reading what Joseph Ahearne posts on his blog. His latest writing really resonated with us, and we felt like sharing it.

Over the past ten years, there’s been a cultural and even media dissuasion against racks, and now it seems they’re coming back into vogue. Currently, everyone wants minimal, lightweight racks, but the truth is, even the lightweight racks don’t weigh all that less than a good fillet or TIG steel rack. And they certainly break more than a fillet or TIG rack.

Roll on over to Joseph Ahearne’s blog to read about his love affair with racks and how it all began with a Stumpjumper.

The post Ahearne on Racks appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
